title: Government Loans and Guarantees (Execution of Instruments) Order, 1976
title_en: Government Loans and Guarantees (Execution of Instruments) Order, 1976

provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the Government Loans and Guarantees (Execution of Instruments) Order.

The power vested in the Minister for Finance to execute any agreement or instrument relating to a loan or guarantee raised or given under the provisions of the Government Loans, Guarantees and Grants Act 1 is hereby delegated to the Permanent Secretary to the Ministry of Finance. 1 Cap. 134 History of this document 31 July 2002 this version Consolidation Related documents More documents like this one [] [] [] [] ▲ To the top > Contact us Visit our Twitter/X profile Visit our Linked In profile Visit our YouTube channel About TanzLII TanzLII is operated by the Judiciary of Tanzania and the Office of the Attorney General, Chief Parliamentary Draftsman, and publishes the law of Tanzania for free online access for all. Free Access to the law supports the rule of law and access to justice. TanzLII partners with African Legal Information Institute and Laws.Africa , who provide it with technical support.
